chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho C.P. No. D-6618 of 2022 [Shahida Atiq versus Province of Sindh & others] Petitioner: Shahida Atiq through Mr. S.M. Ishrat Ghazali, Advocate. Respondent No.1: Province of Sindh through Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Respondents 2 to 4: KMC through Administrator & 02 others through Mr. Altaf Hussain, Advocate assisted by Mr. Asadullah Jan, Advocate. Intervenor: Abdul Rahim Mughal through Mr. Abdul Hameed Khan, Advocate. Date of hearing: 30-10-2024 Date of decision: 30-10-2024 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. - The Petitioner, a retired employee of the KMC Medical Department seeks a writ against dispossession from a quarter allotted to her by the Department whilst in service. Admittedly, the Petitioner retired from service a long time ago, and therefore has no legal basis to retain the accommodation provided by the Department. The fall-back argument of the Petitioner is that she has made an application to the Department to allot the quarter to her ex-husband, who is an employee with the DMC Central, so that her daughters can continue to reside thereat. However, learned counsel for the Petitioner has not been able to show to us the Accommodation Rules under which such a facility is available to the Petitioner. Resultantly, the petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE *PA/SADAM
